description: Configure Jolly Lobby Track for logging package deliveries. Create a Visitor Group named 'Deliveries' that includes a 'Tracking Number' text field. Streamline the registration process for this group by disabling photo capture and agreement signing. Register a test record in the 'Deliveries' group with First Name 'FedEx', Last Name 'Express', and Tracking Number '1Z999AA10123456784', ensuring the record is saved and visible in the log.
